case_title: WING COENG ZHAO VS. XI HONG ZHOU et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-24-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, WING COENG CUAI, WAI LING JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
